metadata.description: Emil Wu's Claude Code plugin collection — investigation, session insights, and more

plugins.name: investigate
plugins.description: Cross-repo investigation workflow — spawn parallel investigators per repo, consolidate findings, produce structured report.

plugins.name: claude-insights-command
plugins.description: Cross-project session insights via /claude-insights-command:insights. Supports project filtering and time range.

plugins.name: claude-insights-skill
plugins.description: Project-scoped session insights via /claude-insights-skill:insights. Auto-detects current project, supports time range.
